_notes.null_mode: isotropic generates uniform RA/Dec null events of the same size as the input.
_notes.null_repeats: Number of independent null draws used to compute empirical percentile ranks.
_notes.num_axes: Number of trial axes in the preferred-axis scan. 48 gives better coverage than the earlier 12-axis version.
_notes.seed: Set to an integer for reproducible results. null means unseeded.
_notes.plots: Generate PNG plots (sky plot, null comparison bar chart, axis scan line plot).
_notes.save_normalized: Write a normalized event CSV alongside the analysis artifacts.
